baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: XHLD exhibits extreme 5-day volatility (+201.7%) in overheat macro regime (stress=2, strict_quality_caution). Fundamentals unavailable; valuation shows negative PE/ROE/ROA; EV/EBITDA negative. No news catalyst within cutoff. Alt-data adapters unconnected; sec_form4 shows insider purchases (descriptor only, no buy signal per §11.6). Filing is 8-K stub. Information integrity layer fail-closed (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false). Insufficient evidence for either surge_short or quality_long sleeve. Macro discipline forbids equity exposure in overheat regime. Decision: no_trade pending fundamental data and narrative clarity.

Retrieve news catalyst narrative from polygon_news or fmp_news with publishedDate <= cutoff

Clarify insider purchase intent via Form 4 context (director Price David Richard accumulated 20k shares Feb-Mar 2025); descriptor-only per §11.6
Await macro regime shift out of overheat before considering equity positions
Verify information_integrity_assessment pollution-defense layer once v1.1+ schema implemented

baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to support surge_short or quality_long sleeve. Fundamentals unavailable; no news catalyst; macro overheat regime forbids equity exposure. Insider purchases are descriptor-only. Information integrity fail-closed. Extreme volatility and negative profitability metrics present risk but lack corroborating narrative and alt-data. Defer decision pending fundamental data, news catalyst, and macro regime shift.

5. Evaluate news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, polygon_news returned 0 rows; no catalyst narrative available
6. Evaluate alternative_data_features: adapters not connected (github_public, sec_13f failed; software_devtools, semiconductor_patent, biotech_clinical, etc. not_connected); cannot corroborate thesis
7. Evaluate sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: market_sentiment scores null; institutional_ownership_pct null; sec_form4 shows 5 insider purchases (descriptor-only, no gate per §11.6)
8. Evaluate information_integrity_assessment: use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false; pollution-defense layer unimplemented; fail-closed by design
9. Evaluate price_snapshot: return_5d_pct=+201.7%, relative_volume_vs_20d=3.82x; extreme volatility suggests event or retail attention, but no corroborating news
10. Evaluate filing_confirmation: sec_8k_stub_data_only; opencli adapter not installed; cannot read Item 8.01 or 9.01 details
11. Evaluate narrative_price_gap_assessment: status=not_evaluated; no LLM reasoning available in v1 generator; cannot assess price-catalyst alignment

12. Check surge_short sleeve eligibility: requires negative catalyst + corroborating alt-data + no veto. Missing: catalyst narrative, alt-data corroboration, fundamental data. Veto: insufficient_evidence, missing_data_persists, information_integrity_fail_closed. INELIGIBLE.

13. Check quality_long sleeve eligibility: requires positive fundamentals + quality metrics + no veto. Missing: fundamental data, positive profitability. Valuation shows negative PE/ROE/ROA. Veto: insufficient_evidence, missing_data_persists, information_integrity_fail_closed. INELIGIBLE.
14. Macro discipline check: overheat regime imposes strict_quality_and_valuation_caution; equity_allocation_cap=20% portfolio-wide; no individual position recommended until regime shifts
15. Final decision: no_trade. Position_size_pct=0.0. Defer pending fundamental data, news catalyst, and macro regime shift.

T+3: Fundamental analysis: fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence; all snapshot_quarter fields null; cannot assess earnings, cash flow, balance sheet
T+4: Catalyst analysis: news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable; items_count=0; polygon_news returned 0 rows in [2025-03-17, 2025-03-24]; no narrative available

T+7: Information integrity analysis: information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false; pollution-defense layer unimplemented; fail-closed by design
T+8: Price/volatility analysis: return_5d_pct=+201.7%, relative_volume_vs_20d=3.82x; extreme volatility suggests event or retail attention, but no corroborating news or filing text
T+9: Filing analysis: filing_confirmation shows 8-K stub data only; sec_8k_fulltext extraction failed (opencli adapter not installed); cannot read Item 8.01 or 9.01 details
T+10: Narrative gap analysis: narrative_price_gap_assessment.status=not_evaluated; no LLM reasoning available in v1 generator; cannot assess price-catalyst alignment
